issues.display_title: Issue #3046: Update Dialog Report Comment New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Dialog Report Comment New Layout

Build the Report Comment dialog layout in the new pages-new post detail (see report-redesign spec).

Scope

  • Dialog: comment preview card (avatar + name + comment text), reason radios, optional details textarea + counter, Submit. <fieldset> + native radios. Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; light/dark.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

  1. Layout match — comment preview + reason list + details + Submit match the design.
  2. Preview — comment text shows (clamped, wraps); missing avatar → placeholder.
  3. Selection + counter — selected reason state; textarea + counter render.
  4. Dismiss + scrim — ✕ / backdrop / Esc close; background dimmed.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; comment preview + accessible reasons + counter; dismiss; light + dark.

RESULT
